payload.label: dining table
payload.long_description: Dark brown wooden rectangular dining table with a polished surface, partially occluded at the front by an ornate carved chair back and with chairs tucked underneath; table edges and lower legs are cropped by the image, suggesting a close viewpoint of about 1.2 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"dining table","short_description":"dark wooden rectangular dining table","long_description":"Dark brown wooden rectangular dining table with a polished surface, partially occluded at the front by an ornate carved chair back and with chairs tucked underneath; table edges and lower legs are cropped by the image, suggesting a close viewpoint of about 1.2 m from the camera.","attributes":["dark brown wood","rectangular tabletop","polished finish","ornate carved chair occluding front","chairs tucked underneath","image edges crop table"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.2}
